data.title: DeBank Services Temporarily Unavailable Due to AWS Outage
data.description: According to Foresight News, DeBank has announced that all its services are temporarily unavailable due to an outage in AWS services. The DeBank team is actively monitoring the situation and working to restore access as soon as possible.

data.title: Binance: All services are gradually being restored, and the withdrawal function has also been reopened
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance official posted on the X platform: "All services are gradually recovering and going back online, and the withdrawal function has also been reopened. Please note that some services may still be delayed during the full recovery of the system. We will continue to monitor to ensure that all operations proceed smoothly."

data.title: U.S. May Use Tariff Cash to Buy Bitcoin
data.description:
During a recent podcast, Hines said the United States could consider buying Bitcoin using money made from tariffs. That’s right—tariffs, the fees foreign countries pay when they sell goods to the U. S. , might become a piggy bank for Bitcoin
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/u-s-may-use-tariff-cash-to-buy-bitcoin/

data.title: OM Token’s $6B Crash – Was It All Part of a Bigger Plan?
data.description:
The Terra Luna like collapse has left the investors questioning if all of this was planned. The community notes that there were warning signs that were ignored which led to this massive loss. Crypto Jargon in a series of X …

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Stands at 16, Reflecting a Weakening Altcoin Trend
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 16. The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization to determine whether the market is shifting towards altcoins or Bitcoin dominance.

data.title: Whales Accumulate Over 800 Million DOGE in 48 Hours
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on-chain analyst @ali_charts has reported that in the past 48 hours, whales have collectively purchased more than 800 million DOGE. This significant accumulation highlights the ongoing interest and activity in the cryptocurrency market, particularly concerning Dogecoin. The substantial buying activity by large holders, often referred to as 'whales,' could potentially influence the market dynamics and price movements of DOGE. The reasons behind this surge in purchases remain a topic of interest among analysts and investors.

data.title: HTX DAO launches new X Space column "DAO Friends Please Stay"
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, HTX DAO's new X Space column "DAO Friends Please Stay" will be launched today. The first episode "Let DAO Become Your Shining Place" will be broadcast at 20:00 (UTC+8) on April 15. At that time, HTX DAO core builders Liu Ye and Helium, HTX DAO governance committee members DaDa, Zhiliao, PPP, Maomao Sister, and Frank will all be present to discuss the future development blueprint of HTX DAO.
It is reported that the column was prepared and initiated by DaDa, the second honorary committee member of HTX DAO, and originated from the promotion of the HIP-002 proposal. It aims to build an efficient communication platform integrating communication, due diligence and interaction through the deep integration of content and governance. It is not only an important window for HTX DAO to show itself to the outside world, but also a key bridge connecting the community, project parties and investors.

data.title: CryptoQuant: BTC market risk remains high, with only 24% of circulating supply currently in unrealized loss state
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoQuant analyst Crazzyblockk pointed out that despite the correction in Bitcoin prices, market risks are still high. Currently, only 24% of the circulating supply is in an unrealized loss state, indicating that the market has not yet entered a high-confidence re-accumulation phase. Long-term holders absorb downward pressure, which usually indicates a long period of consolidation or further volatility. It is recommended to wait and see and wait for market structure and investor behavior to confirm the direction before making a decision.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation member: ERC-7786 will improve cross-chain messaging, and related discussions will be held on April 16
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: joshrudolf.eth, a member of the Ethereum Foundation, wrote in an article on X that only a few key technologies are needed to solve 95% of Ethereum's cross-chain user experience problems, among which cross-chain messaging is one of the core. ERC-7786 proposes to integrate messaging standards through a unified API, aiming to provide a secure cross-chain messaging interface for decentralized applications. Currently, the discussion of ERC-7786 will be held on April 16.

data.title: Binance will remove VIDT/BTC spot trading pair
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will remove the VIDT/BTC spot trading pair at 8:30 (UTC) on April 15, 2025, and simultaneously terminate the spot trading robot service for this trading pair. Users need to update or cancel the relevant trading robots in advance to avoid potential losses. (This newsletter is generated by AI)
